description: Composition Full sleeves shirt with white, green and navy blue stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a brand badge embroidered on left chest, snap button on elbow, full length buttoned placket, and curved hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron If you are bored of wearing t-shirts, try this striped casual shirt from locomotive for your weekend parties. The eye-catching stripes will make you the most popular guy at the party with ease! Look ruggedly handsome by teaming it with jeans and smart shoes. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6", Shoulders-19"
